# Third-party notice: Humanizer

This project references and adapts selected editorial ideas from the open-source Humanizer skill.

- Project: Humanizer

The upstream skill is not vendored in full. This repository provides an integration guide and a compact adapted checklist for journalistic writing. The original MIT license is included in this directory.
